title: OpenAPI Tools Knowledge Base
description: Agent-ready registry of 195 tools for working with OpenAPI. Structured for semantic search, vector embedding, and RAG retrieval. Source: openapi.tools.

agent_context.purpose: Tool discovery and recommendation for OpenAPI toolchain decisions
agent_context.retrieval_hint: Index `name`, `description_vector_text`, `tags`, `use_cases`, and `languages` for semantic search. Use `id` as stable cache key. Filter by `primary_category` for scoped queries.

tools.name: Stainless
tools.description_vector_text: Stainless is a SDK Generators tool for OpenAPI. Use cases: sdk-generation, sdk-publishing. Tags: sdk, codegen, npm, publish, package-manager. Languages: TypeScript, Python, Go, Ruby, Java, Kotlin, C#, PHP, Swift, Rust. Type: saas.
